demo.title: hermesone-setup.ts

setup: Heads up: install/update download a native build from `fathah/hermes-desktop` and run it on the host. The package verifies sha512 (fail-closed) and prompts interactively — but require explicit user approval; never auto-install from an agent workflow
Requires Node.js 18+ (built-in fetch). The interactive UI needs a TTY; non-interactive contexts print plain output
Install the CLI (no app install yet): `npm install -g hermesone@0.2.0`
Preview then install: `hermesone plan` to show the release/asset/size/sha512, then `hermesone install` after the user confirms (add `--yes` for non-interactive)
Pin a release with `hermesone install <tag>` or `HERMESONE_VERSION=<tag>`; `npm install` does not auto-install the app unless `HERMESONE_AUTO_INSTALL=1`
